title: subagent — a subagent transcript spawned by a session
description: A BOUND type: a child transcript under a session's <uuid>/subagents/ folder, not a session in its own right. The capabilities are concerned with it only as a per-session count today, so it has no projection of its own yet (no x-projection) — the schema declares the type so the vocabulary in schemas/ is complete. When a subagent view is grown, add x-projection and the query that materializes it. See canon/anatomy.md § contained and bound substrates.

id.description: The subagent transcript id (agent-<hex>). Foreign id.
